rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees inside annex agree blocks within component type or implementation scopes.
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range constraints.
generic_rules: Declare helper equations for range checks using boolean expressions.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Equation declarations in AGREE use the pattern `eq name : type = expression;`.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing AGREE contracts outside of annex blocks or in invalid component scopes.
Do not mismatch types in helper declarations and their associated expressions.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
